text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is even more enthusiastic than
usual, determined to earn her place in the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now a "twinkly" racer that others are desperate
to compete against, she steels herself for the
race.
